title: PREPARE DATE_ADD/DATE_SUB incorrectly returns DATETIME
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE NOT NULL);
SELECT DATE_ADD(event_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS next_day FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', DATE_ADD(event_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS next_day FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Prepared statements return DateTime instead of Date
